title: The Iran War Permanently Altered the Global Economy
summary_full: The global order has been altered, and economies are unlikely to simply pick up where they left off before the U.S. and Israel began bombing Iran.
summary_public: The global order has been altered, and economies are unlikely to simply pick up where they left off before the U.S. and Israel began bombing Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. and Israel began bombing Iran.
